data.title: Tutors International, My Homeschool Expert join forces for bespoke home education, offering 50-state compliance with elite tutors.
data.description: A recent collaboration between Tutors International and My Homeschool Expert is set to provide American families with a comprehensive educational solution. This partnership ensures families across all 50 states receive clear guidance on compliance while also benefiting from a tailored tutoring experience. Through this alliance, families can expect a precisely matched tutor who will deliver a personalized education. By combining the expertise of both companies, the partnership aims to offer 50-state compliance alongside elite, full-time tutoring services for families in the US.

data.title: Spa Medicca partners with Skin Science Aesthetics in Columbus, Ohio; part of network backed by Seven Hills Capital.
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio on September 18, 2025, Spa Medicca, a prominent provider of aesthetic and wellness medical services supported by Seven Hills Capital, has welcomed Skin Science Aesthetics into its expanding network. This collaboration brings about an increase in the number of affiliated practices under Spa Medicca's umbrella.

data.title: Global modular construction market projected to reach $148.57 billion by 2029 from $101.67 billion in 2024, growing at 8.3% CAGR.
data.description: Dublin - The latest report on the Modular Construction Market predicts substantial growth in the industry, with the market size projected to increase from $101.67 billion in 2024 to $107.83 billion in 2025 at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.1%. This growth is attributed to technological advancements, cost efficiency, and rising awareness of sustainability practices. By 2029, the market is forecasted to reach $148.57 billion, marking a CAGR of 8.3%. The positive trajectory indicates a promising future for the modular construction sector.

data.title: Polymarket, Kalshi lead Web3 betting with $200M, $185M raises; Polymarket hits $644M trading volume in Aug via blockchain.
data.description: Former Polymarket executive Toni Gemayel announced on social media that he will invest $15 million in a new blockchain-based online prediction market, The Clearing Company. Polymarket raised $200 million on a $1 billion valuation in June, and Kalshi raised $185 million on a $2 billion valuation the same month. In August, Polymarket saw over $644 million in trading volume. The platform operates on Ethereum and Polygon Layer 2, allowing users to bet on real-world events using stablecoins. About 40% of Polymarket's sales volume comes from sports betting, and 40% from cryptocurrency price predictions. Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin refers to prediction markets as "info finance". This move highlights the growing interest in the Web3 space for online betting markets.

data.title: Stock market hits new highs as economy cools. U.S. economy is services-oriented (70% GDP), S&P 500 evenly split. S&P 500 accounts for 80% value of U.S. stocks. U.S. earnings growth strong, best in years. U.S. stock market has been rising due to earnings growth. Large-cap companies in S&P 500 have more favorable growth prospects.
data.description: The stock market reached new highs last week despite cooling economic indicators. The U.S. stock market and economy are closely linked but differ in their composition, with S&P 500 earnings evenly split between services and goods/manufacturing. The S&P 500 represents 80% of all U.S. stock value, outstripping global markets, and U.S. companies have shown strong earnings growth prospects compared to the rest of the world, with earnings being a key driver of stock prices. The S&P 500's earnings have consistently risen over the years, leading to the market's upward trajectory. Large-cap companies in the S&P 500 have more favorable earnings growth prospects than small and mid-cap companies. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sunstone Winery introduces SOLIS™, a new functional mushroom beverage, marking a shift in alcohol sales trends.
data.description: In Santa Ynez, California, on September 18, 2025, Sunstone Winery revealed the introduction of SOLIS™, an innovative functional mushroom drink, marking a major step towards a wellness-oriented drink market. This beverage launch signifies a transformation in consumer preferences, aiming to cater to the rising demand for health-conscious refreshments. Sunstone Winery, known as one of California's prominent wine estates, is pioneering this shift by offering a cutting-edge product tailored for individuals seeking a balance between indulgence and well-being. The launch of SOLIS™ represents Sunstone Winery's commitment to adapt to evolving consumer trends, catering to the growing market of individuals prioritizing health in their beverage choices.

data.title: Author Brad D. Nelson, PhD provides hope post-divorce. Book title: "A Broken Vow And..." published in Belleville, Illinois.
data.description: Xulon Press introduces a source of hope for individuals navigating the challenges of divorce, with the message that personal growth is achievable in the aftermath. In a recent release dated September 18, 2025, from Belleville, Illinois, author Brad D. Nelson, PhD, extends support and practical advice to those experiencing divorce in his book titled "A Broken Vow And...". Nelson's work aims to inspire individuals to reinvent themselves even after the emotional turmoil of divorce, offering reassurance and direction during such difficult times.

data.title: Formation Bio hires key executives from top biotech, pharma companies to boost AI-driven drug development. 4 new leaders join as company scales up operations.
data.description: A group of executives hailing from Pfizer, BenevolentAI, Incyte, and AMAG have united to fortify the clinical, technology, financial, and scientific expertise of Formation Bio. This move comes as the company expands its AI-centric pharmaceutical approach. The collaboration, announced on September 18, 2025, underscores the firm's strategic focus on integrating cutting-edge technology and innovation into the pharmaceutical industry.
